words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: stand up for justice; act bravely for a righteous cause
words.chinese_explanation: 看见正义的事情，勇敢地去帮助别人。

examples.zh: 林叔叔见义勇为，帮助警察抓住小偷。
examples.en: Uncle Lim bravely helped the police catch the thief.
examples.pinyin: lín shū shū jiàn yì yǒng wéi bāng zhù jǐng chá zhuā zhù xiǎo tōu

examples.zh: 他见义勇为，救了一位老人。
examples.en: He bravely rescued an elderly person.
examples.pinyin: tā jiàn yì yǒng wéi jiù le yī wèi lǎo rén

examples.zh: 我们应该学习见义勇为的精神。
examples.en: We should learn the spirit of standing up for justice.
examples.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi xué xí jiàn yì yǒng wèi de jīng shén

examples.zh: 他因为见义勇为受到大家的表扬。
examples.en: He was praised by everyone for his bravery.
examples.pinyin: tā yīn wèi jiàn yì yǒng wéi shòu dào dà jiā de biǎo yáng

examples.zh: 见义勇为是值得我们学习的美德。
examples.en: Standing up for justice is a virtue worth learning.
examples.pinyin: jiàn yì yǒng wéi shì zhí de wǒ men xué xí de měi dé

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: jiàn yì yǒng wéi

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: as fast as lightning; extremely fast
words.chinese_explanation: 形容速度非常快，像风和闪电一样迅速。

examples.zh: 警车风驰电掣地赶到现场。
examples.en: The police car arrived at the scene extremely quickly.
examples.pinyin: jǐng chē fēng chí diàn chè dì gǎn dào xiàn chǎng

examples.zh: 救护车风驰电掣地开来。
examples.en: The ambulance came speeding like lightning.
examples.pinyin: jiù hù chē fēng chí diàn chè dì kāi lái

examples.zh: 他风驰电掣地跑向终点。
examples.en: He ran towards the finish line at great speed.
examples.pinyin: tā fēng chí diàn chè dì pǎo xiàng zhōng diǎn

examples.zh: 消防车风驰电掣地赶往火场。
examples.en: The fire engine rushed to the fire scene at lightning speed.
examples.pinyin: xiāo fáng chē fēng chí diàn chè dì gǎn wǎng huǒ chǎng

examples.zh: 小狗风驰电掣地追着球跑。
examples.en: The puppy chased the ball very quickly.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo gǒu fēng chí diàn chè dì zhuī zhe qiú pǎo

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: fēng chí diàn chè

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: suspicious; acting suspiciously

examples.zh: 那名男子形迹可疑，我们要小心。
examples.en: That man looks suspicious, so we must be careful.
examples.pinyin: nà míng nán zi xíng jì kě yí wǒ men yào xiǎo xīn

examples.zh: 保安发现一个形迹可疑的人在商场里徘徊。
examples.en: The security guard noticed a suspicious person wandering in the mall.
examples.pinyin: bǎo ān fā xiàn yí gè xíng jì kě yí de rén zài shāng chǎng lǐ pái huái

examples.zh: 警察一直观察那个形迹可疑的男子。
examples.en: The police kept watching the suspicious man.
examples.pinyin: jǐng chá yì zhí guān chá nà ge xíng jì kě yí de nán zi

examples.zh: 他东张西望，形迹可疑。
examples.en: He kept looking around and appeared suspicious.
examples.pinyin: tā dōng zhāng xī wàng xíng jì kě yí

examples.zh: 老师发现校门外有一个形迹可疑的陌生人。
examples.en: The teacher saw a suspicious stranger outside the school gate.
examples.pinyin: lǎo shī fā xiàn xiào mén wài yǒu yí gè xíng jì kě yí de mò shēng rén

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: xíng jì kě yí

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: terrified; scared out of one's wits
words.chinese_explanation: 形容非常害怕，惊恐万分。

examples.zh: 小偷看到警察，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: The thief was terrified when he saw the police.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu kàn dào jǐng chá xià dé hún fēi pò sàn

examples.zh: 她听到巨响，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: She was scared out of her wits by the loud noise.
examples.pinyin: tā tīng dào jù xiǎng xià dé hún fēi pò sàn

examples.zh: 孩子差点被车撞到，妈妈吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: The mother was terrified when her child almost got hit by a car.
examples.pinyin: hái zi chà diǎn bèi chē zhuàng dào mā mā xià dé hún fēi pò sàn

examples.zh: 地震发生时，人们吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: People were terrified when the earthquake happened.
examples.pinyin: dì zhèn fā shēng shí rén men xià dé hún fēi pò sàn

examples.zh: 他差点跌下楼梯，吓得魂飞魄散。
examples.en: He was frightened out of his wits when he almost fell down the stairs.
examples.pinyin: tā chà diǎn diē xià lóu tī xià dé hún fēi pò sàn

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: hún fēi pò sàn

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: run away immediately; take to one's heels
words.chinese_explanation: 马上跑开，形容动作很快。

examples.zh: 小偷抢了包后，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The thief ran away immediately after snatching the bag.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu qiǎng le bāo hòu bá tuǐ jiù pǎo

examples.zh: 小猫看到大狗，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The kitten ran away immediately when it saw the big dog.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo māo kàn dào dà gǒu bá tuǐ jiù pǎo

examples.zh: 听见雷声，他拔腿就跑回家。
examples.en: He ran home immediately after hearing the thunder.
examples.pinyin: tīng jiàn léi shēng tā bá tuǐ jiù pǎo huí jiā

examples.zh: 学生快迟到了，拔腿就跑进教室。
examples.en: The student ran into the classroom quickly because he was almost late.
examples.pinyin: xué shēng kuài chí dào le bá tuǐ jiù pǎo jìn jiào shì

examples.zh: 老鼠看到猫，拔腿就跑。
examples.en: The mouse ran away immediately when it saw the cat.
examples.pinyin: lǎo shǔ kàn dào māo bá tuǐ jiù pǎo

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: bá tuǐ jiù pǎo

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: sneaky; shifty-looking
words.chinese_explanation: 形容举动偷偷摸摸，不光明正大。

examples.zh: 那个人贼头贼脑，看起来不像好人。
examples.en: That person looked sneaky and did not seem like a good person.
examples.pinyin: nà ge rén zéi tóu zéi nǎo kàn qǐ lái bù xiàng hǎo rén

examples.zh: 他一直东张西望，贼头贼脑。
examples.en: He kept looking around sneakily.
examples.pinyin: tā yì zhí dōng zhāng xī wàng zéi tóu zéi nǎo

examples.zh: 保安注意到一个贼头贼脑的人。
examples.en: The security guard noticed a sneaky person.
examples.pinyin: bǎo ān zhù yì dào yí gè zéi tóu zéi nǎo de rén

examples.zh: 小偷贼头贼脑地靠近那位女士。
examples.en: The thief sneaked towards the lady.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu zéi tóu zéi nǎo dì kào jìn nà wèi nǚ shì

examples.zh: 他鬼鬼祟祟，贼头贼脑，令人怀疑。
examples.en: He acted sneakily and suspiciously.
examples.pinyin: tā guǐ guǐ suì suì zéi tóu zéi nǎo lìng rén huái yí

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: zéi tóu zéi nǎo

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: stare without blinking; look attentively
words.chinese_explanation: 眼睛一动不动地看，形容非常专心。

examples.zh: 小朋友目不转睛地看魔术表演。
examples.en: The children watched the magic show attentively.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo péng yǒu mù bù zhuǎn jīng dì kàn mó shù biǎo yǎn

examples.zh: 全班同学目不转睛地看着老师做实验。
examples.en: The whole class watched the teacher do the experiment attentively.
examples.pinyin: quán bān tóng xué mù bù zhuǎn jīng dì kàn zhe lǎo shī zuò shí yàn

examples.zh: 我目不转睛地看着精彩的比赛。
examples.en: I watched the exciting match without taking my eyes off it.
examples.pinyin: wǒ mù bù zhuǎn jīng dì kàn zhe jīng cǎi de bǐ sài

examples.zh: 妹妹目不转睛地看动画片。
examples.en: My younger sister stared at the cartoon attentively.
examples.pinyin: mèi mèi mù bù zhuǎn jīng dì kàn dòng huà piàn

examples.zh: 大家目不转睛地看着美丽的烟花。
examples.en: Everyone watched the beautiful fireworks attentively.
examples.pinyin: dà jiā mù bù zhuǎn jīng dì kàn zhe měi lì de yān huā

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: mù bù zhuǎn jīng

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: break the law; violate the law

examples.zh: 小偷偷东西，已经触犯法律。
examples.en: The thief broke the law by stealing.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu tōu dōng xī yǐ jīng chù fàn fǎ lǜ

examples.zh: 每个人都不能触犯法律。
examples.en: No one should break the law.
examples.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu bù néng chù fàn fǎ lǜ

examples.zh: 酒后驾驶会触犯法律。
examples.en: Drunk driving breaks the law.
examples.pinyin: jiǔ hòu jià shǐ huì chù fàn fǎ lǜ

examples.zh: 偷东西是触犯法律的行为。
examples.en: Stealing is an act that violates the law.
examples.pinyin: tōu dōng xī shì chù fàn fǎ lǜ de xíng wéi

examples.zh: 我们要遵守法律，不要触犯法律。
examples.en: We must obey the law and not break it.
examples.pinyin: wǒ men yào zūn shǒu fǎ lǜ bú yào chù fàn fǎ lǜ

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: chù fàn fǎ lǜ

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: come to someone’s aid; help bravely
words.chinese_explanation: 看见别人有困难或受欺负时，主动帮助。

examples.zh: 林叔叔拔刀相助，帮女士追回了包。
examples.en: Uncle Lim came to the lady’s aid and helped recover her bag.
examples.pinyin: lín shū shū bá dāo xiāng zhù bāng nǚ shì zhuī huí le bāo

examples.zh: 路人拔刀相助，救了受伤的孩子。
examples.en: A passer-by came forward to help the injured child.
examples.pinyin: lù rén bá dāo xiāng zhù jiù le shòu shāng de hái zi

examples.zh: 同学跌倒时，他马上拔刀相助。
examples.en: He immediately helped when his classmate fell down.
examples.pinyin: tóng xué diē dǎo shí tā mǎ shàng bá dāo xiāng zhù

examples.zh: 我们要学习拔刀相助的精神。
examples.en: We should learn the spirit of helping others bravely.
examples.pinyin: wǒ men yào xué xí bá dāo xiāng zhù de jīng shén

examples.zh: 他拔刀相助，因此受到大家感谢。
examples.en: He helped bravely and was thanked by everyone.
examples.pinyin: tā bá dāo xiāng zhù yīn cǐ shòu dào dà jiā gǎn xiè

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: bá dāo xiāng zhù

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: brush past; pass by closely
words.chinese_explanation: 肩膀几乎碰到肩膀地经过；也可指错过机会。

examples.zh: 小偷和女士擦肩而过时，抢走了她的包。
examples.en: The thief snatched the lady’s bag as he brushed past her.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu hé nǚ shì cā jiān ér guò shí qiǎng zǒu le tā de bāo

examples.zh: 我们在人群中擦肩而过，却没有发现彼此。
examples.en: We brushed past each other in the crowd without noticing.
examples.pinyin: wǒ men zài rén qún zhōng cā jiān ér guò què méi yǒu fā xiàn bǐ cǐ

examples.zh: 他与好机会擦肩而过，感到很可惜。
examples.en: He missed a good opportunity and felt regretful.
examples.pinyin: tā yǔ hǎo jī huì cā jiān ér guò gǎn dào hěn kě xī

examples.zh: 两辆车擦肩而过，十分危险。
examples.en: The two cars passed very close to each other, which was dangerous.
examples.pinyin: liǎng liàng chē cā jiān ér guò shí fēn wēi xiǎn

examples.zh: 我差一点就和老师擦肩而过。
examples.en: I almost brushed past my teacher.
examples.pinyin: wǒ chà yì diǎn jiù hé lǎo shī cā jiān ér guò

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: cā jiān ér guò

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: lost and found again; recovered after being lost

examples.zh: 钱包失而复得，女士非常高兴。
examples.en: The lady was very happy when her lost wallet was recovered.
examples.pinyin: qián bāo shī ér fù de nǚ shì fēi cháng gāo xìng

examples.zh: 我的手机失而复得，真是太幸运了。
examples.en: My lost phone was found again; I was very lucky.
examples.pinyin: wǒ de shǒu jī shī ér fù de zhēn shì tài xìng yùn le

examples.zh: 书本失而复得后，我松了一口气。
examples.en: I breathed a sigh of relief after my lost book was found.
examples.pinyin: shū běn shī ér fù de hòu wǒ sōng le yì kǒu qì

examples.zh: 小狗失而复得，全家人都很开心。
examples.en: The whole family was happy when the lost puppy was found again.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo gǒu shī ér fù de quán jiā rén dōu hěn kāi xīn

examples.zh: 证件终于失而复得，他喜出望外。
examples.en: He was pleasantly surprised when his lost document was recovered.
examples.pinyin: zhèng jiàn zhōng yú shī ér fù de tā xǐ chū wàng wài

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: shī ér fù de

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: escape quickly; run away

examples.zh: 小偷抢了包后，想逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The thief wanted to run away after snatching the bag.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu qiǎng le bāo hòu xiǎng táo zhī yāo yāo

examples.zh: 狐狸看到猎人，立刻逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The fox ran away immediately when it saw the hunter.
examples.pinyin: hú lí kàn dào liè rén lì kè táo zhī yāo yāo

examples.zh: 看见老师走来，他逃之夭夭。
examples.en: He ran away when he saw the teacher coming.
examples.pinyin: kàn jiàn lǎo shī zǒu lái tā táo zhī yāo yāo

examples.zh: 骗子骗了钱后逃之夭夭。
examples.en: The cheat ran away after taking the money.
examples.pinyin: piàn zi piàn le qián hòu táo zhī yāo yāo

examples.zh: 犯人想逃之夭夭，却被警察抓住了。
examples.en: The criminal tried to escape but was caught by the police.
examples.pinyin: fàn rén xiǎng táo zhī yāo yāo què bèi jǐng chá zhuā zhù le

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: táo zhī yāo yāo

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: completely empty; not a single person

examples.zh: 放学后，教室里空无一人。
examples.en: After school, there was no one in the classroom.
examples.pinyin: fàng xué hòu jiào shì lǐ kōng wú yì rén

examples.zh: 比赛结束后，操场空无一人。
examples.en: After the match, the field was completely empty.
examples.pinyin: bǐ sài jié shù hòu cāo chǎng kōng wú yì rén

examples.zh: 清晨的公园空无一人。
examples.en: The park was empty in the early morning.
examples.pinyin: qīng chén de gōng yuán kōng wú yì rén

examples.zh: 商店关门后，里面空无一人。
examples.en: After the shop closed, there was no one inside.
examples.pinyin: shāng diàn guān mén hòu lǐ miàn kōng wú yì rén

examples.zh: 深夜的街道空无一人。
examples.en: The street was empty late at night.
examples.pinyin: shēn yè de jiē dào kōng wú yì rén

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: kōng wú yì rén

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: surrender without resistance; be caught without struggle

examples.zh: 小偷被警察包围，只好束手就擒。
examples.en: The thief was surrounded by the police and had to surrender.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu bèi jǐng chá bāo wéi zhǐ hǎo shù shǒu jiù qín

examples.zh: 犯人终于束手就擒。
examples.en: The criminal finally surrendered.
examples.pinyin: fàn rén zhōng yú shù shǒu jiù qín

examples.zh: 警察赶到后，坏人束手就擒。
examples.en: After the police arrived, the bad guy gave himself up.
examples.pinyin: jǐng chá gǎn dào hòu huài rén shù shǒu jiù qín

examples.zh: 小偷知道跑不了，只好束手就擒。
examples.en: The thief knew he could not escape and had to surrender.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu zhī dào pǎo bù liǎo zhǐ hǎo shù shǒu jiù qín

examples.zh: 在大家的帮助下，抢匪最终束手就擒。
examples.en: With everyone’s help, the robber was finally caught.
examples.pinyin: zài dà jiā de bāng zhù xià qiǎng fěi zuì zhōng shù shǒu jiù qín

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: shù shǒu jiù qín

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: clever and brave

examples.zh: 小乐机智勇敢，帮助阿姨抓住了小偷。
examples.en: Xiaole was clever and brave, helping the auntie catch the thief.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo lè jī zhì yǒng gǎn bāng zhù ā yí zhuā zhù le xiǎo tōu

examples.zh: 她机智勇敢地救了妹妹。
examples.en: She cleverly and bravely saved her younger sister.
examples.pinyin: tā jī zhì yǒng gǎn dì jiù le mèi mèi

examples.zh: 消防员机智勇敢，救出了被困的人。
examples.en: The firefighters were clever and brave and rescued the trapped people.
examples.pinyin: xiāo fáng yuán jī zhì yǒng gǎn jiù chū le bèi kùn de rén

examples.zh: 他机智勇敢地报警。
examples.en: He cleverly and bravely called the police.
examples.pinyin: tā jī zhì yǒng gǎn dì bào jǐng

examples.zh: 我们要做一个机智勇敢的孩子。
examples.en: We should be clever and brave children.
examples.pinyin: wǒ men yào zuò yí gè jī zhì yǒng gǎn de hái zi

words.section: 犯罪系列
words.group: 犯罪系列
words.pinyin: jī zhì yǒng gǎn

words.lesson: 犯罪系列
words.english: look around
words.chinese_explanation: 四处看，常表示不专心或可疑。

examples.zh: 小偷东张西望，让人觉得很可疑。
examples.en: The thief was look around, which made people suspicious.
examples.pinyin: xiǎo tōu dōng zhāng xī wàng ràng rén jué de hěn kě yí

examples.zh: 作文中用上“东张西望”这个词，句子会更生动。
examples.en: Using “东张西望” in composition makes the sentence more vivid.
examples.pinyin: zuò wén zhōng yòng shàng dōng zhāng xī wàng zhè ge cí jù zi huì gēng shēng dòng

examples.zh: 看到这一幕，大家都想到了“东张西望”这个词。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.word: 这段录像的主要内容是：在图书馆里要为他人着想，注意自己的言行举止。
words.english: The main content of this video is: Be considerate of others and pay attention to your words and deeds in the library.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十一-为他人着想
words.pinyin: zhè duàn lù xiàng de zhǔ yào nèi róng shì ： zài tú shū guǎn lǐ yào wèi tā rén zhuó xiǎng ， zhù yì zì jǐ de yán xíng jǔ zhǐ 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.word: 在录像中，我看到有一名男同学在图书馆看书。他坐在桌子前专心致志地看书。当他看完书之后，就把书本放回了书架上，方便他人找书。
words.english: In the video, I saw a male student reading in the library. He sat at the table and read attentively. After he finished reading, he put the books back on the bookshelf so that others could find them.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十一-为他人着想

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.word: 我还看到一群人在排队借书，有两个男生在大声讲话。一个高个子的男生看见了，连忙走上前阻止他们，告诉他们应该保持安静，不应该影响别人。那两名男生听了，感到非常不好意思。
words.english: I also saw a group of people queuing up to borrow books. Two boys were talking loudly. A tall boy saw it and stepped forward to stop them. He told them that they should stay quiet and not disturb others. The two boys felt very embarrassed after hearing this.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十一-为他人着想

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.word: 看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为男孩看完书后，把书本放回书架上的行为是正确的，是值得我们学习和称赞的。因为图书馆是大家读书学习的好地方，在这里一定要时刻记得为他人着想，注意自己的言行举止，做一个为他人着想的好公民。如果是我，我也会像他们那样做。
words.english: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the boy's behavior of putting the books back on the bookshelf after reading them is correct and worthy of our learning and praise. Because the library is a good place for everyone to read and study, you must always remember to think of others, pay attention to your words and deeds, and be a good citizen who thinks of others. If it were me, I would do what they did.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十一：《为他人着想》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十一-为他人着想

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十二：《遇到困难不放弃》
words.word: 在录像中，我看到一个周末的上午，在组屋楼下，一位男孩在爸爸的帮助下学骑脚踏车。突然，男孩失去平衡，跌倒在地，爸爸急忙上前把男孩扶起来。男孩的爸爸不让他继续学了。可是，男孩不肯放弃，他想再试试，爸爸只好答应了。这一次，男孩骑得很稳，没有再摔倒了。
words.english: In the video, I saw a boy learning to ride a bicycle with the help of his father on a weekend morning downstairs in a HDB flat. Suddenly, the boy lost his balance and fell to the ground. The father hurriedly stepped forward to help the boy up. The boy's father did not allow him to continue studying. However, the boy refused to give up and wanted to try again, so his father had no choice but to agree. This time, the boy rode steadily and did not fall again.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十二：《遇到困难不放弃》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十二-遇到困难不放弃

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十二：《遇到困难不放弃》
words.word: 看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为男孩遇到困难不放弃的精神是值得我们学习和称赞的。因为在人生的道路上，我们都会遇到困难，只要我们勇于面对，坚持到底，就能克服困难。如果是我，我也会像男孩那样做。
words.english: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the boy's spirit of not giving up when encountering difficulties is worthy of our study and praise, because we will all encounter difficulties on the road of life. As long as we have the courage to face it and persevere to the end, we can overcome difficulties. If it were me, I would do the same thing as the boy.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十二：《遇到困难不放弃》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十二-遇到困难不放弃

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.word: 在录像中，我看到一个穿着校服的女生，背着书包，走在放学回家的路上。突然，女生发现地上有一块手表。女生赶快走上前，捡起手表，仔细一看，原来是自己非常喜欢的一块手表。正在这时，一位妈妈带着她的女儿和儿子，正在四处寻找东西，看起来十分着急。女生猜想这块手表应该是他们要找的东西。于是，女生三步并作两步地走上前，把手表物归原主。
words.english: In the video, I saw a girl in school uniform, carrying a schoolbag, walking on her way home from school. Suddenly, the girl found a watch on the ground. The girl quickly stepped forward, picked up the watch, and took a closer look. It turned out to be a watch that she liked very much. At this moment, a mother was looking for something with her daughter and son, looking very anxious. The girls guessed that this watch should be what they were looking for. So, the girl stepped forward in three steps and returned the watch to its original owner.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十三-诚实

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.word: 小女孩看见失而复得的手表，露出开心的笑容，并向女生连声道谢。女孩的妈妈竖起大拇指，称赞她是个拾金不昧的好孩子。
words.english: The little girl smiled happily when she saw the lost watch and thanked the girl repeatedly. The girl's mother gave her a thumbs up and praised her as a good child who found money.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十三-诚实

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.word: 看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为录像中女生诚实的行为，是值得我们学习和称赞的。因为诚实是一种美德，我们应该要有拾金不昧的精神，做一个诚实的人。当我们看见贵重的物品时，应该物归原主，不应该占为己有。如果我是录像中的女生，我也会像她一样，在捡到东西时，及时地物归原主。
words.english: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think the honest behavior of the girls in the video is worthy of our learning and praise. Because honesty is a virtue, we should have the spirit of picking up money and be an honest person. When we see valuable items, we should return them to their original owners and should not keep them for ourselves. If I were the girl in the video, I would be like her and return things to their original owners promptly when I pick them up.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十三：《诚实》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十三-诚实

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.word: 这张图片的主要内容是：做错事时应该勇敢面对，主动认错并承担责任。
words.english: The main content of this picture is: when you do something wrong, you should face it bravely, take the initiative to admit your mistake and take responsibility.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十四-勇于承认错误
words.pinyin: zhè zhāng tú piàn de zhǔ yào nèi róng shì ： zuò cuò shì shí yīng gāi yǒng gǎn miàn duì ， zhǔ dòng rèn cuò bìng chéng dān zé rèn 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.word: 在图片中，我看到有一家人在海边开心地玩沙滩排球。其中一个小男孩在打球时，一个不小心用力过猛，球打中了一个坐在树下看书的小女孩。小女孩疼得叫了起来。小男孩感到很不好意思，他勇敢地走到小女孩面前，向小女孩道歉。小女孩也非常大方地原谅了他，并把球还给了小男孩。
words.english: In the picture, I saw a family happily playing beach volleyball at the beach. One of the little boys was playing ball when he accidentally hit the ball too hard and hit a little girl who was sitting under a tree reading a book. The little girl screamed in pain. The little boy felt very embarrassed. He bravely walked up to the little girl and apologized to the little girl. The little girl also graciously forgave him and returned the ball to the little boy.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十四-勇于承认错误

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.word: 看了这一幕，我感到十分开心。我认为小男孩勇于认错的态度是值得我们学习和称赞的。因为每个人都可能犯错，重要的是当我们犯了错误后，要知错能改，不要再犯同样的错误。如果是我，我也会像他一样，做错事主动认错。
words.english: I felt very happy after watching this scene. I think the little boy's attitude of having the courage to admit his mistakes is worthy of our study and praise, because everyone can make mistakes. The important thing is that when we make mistakes, we should know the mistakes and correct them so as not to make the same mistakes again. If it were me, I would take the initiative to admit my mistakes like him.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十四：《勇于承认错误》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十四-勇于承认错误

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.word: 在图片中，我看到有一个扎着辫子的小女孩，背着书包，走进了麦当劳快餐店。她找了一个位子坐下来，然后从书包里拿出钱包，去柜台买汉堡和饮料，却把手机留在桌子上。
words.english: In the picture, I saw a little girl with pigtails walking into a McDonald's fast food restaurant with a schoolbag on her back. She found a seat and sat down, then took out her wallet from her schoolbag and went to the counter to buy burgers and drinks but left her mobile phone on the table.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十五-责任心

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.word: 买完食物后，她端着餐盘回到座位，边吃边看手机。这时，她的手机响了。她赶快拿起手机走到快餐店外面接电话，却把钱包留在桌子上。快餐店的服务人员看到桌子上的钱包，摇了摇头，觉得钱包的主人真的太粗心了。于是，服务员就站在桌边，等着钱包的主人回来，并提醒她要保管好自己的贵重物品。
words.english: After buying the food, she returned to her seat with the dinner plate and looked at her phone while eating. At this moment, her cell phone rang. She quickly picked up her phone and walked outside the fast food restaurant to answer the call, but left her wallet on the table. The waiter at the fast food restaurant saw the wallet on the table and shook his head, feeling that the owner of the wallet was really careless. So, the waiter stood at the table, waiting for the owner of the wallet to come back, and reminded her to keep her valuables safe.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十五-责任心

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.word: 看了这一幕，我感到十分担心。我认为那位小女孩真是太粗心了，丢三落四的，没有责任心。因为如果手机或钱包弄丢了或者被偷走就麻烦了，会给自己带来麻烦和损失。如果我是图片中的小女孩，我会保管好自己的财物，避免给自己带来不必要的财物损失。
words.english: After watching this scene, I felt very worried. I thought the little girl was so careless and irresponsible because if her cell phone or wallet was lost or stolen, it would be troublesome and would bring trouble and losses to herself. If I were the little girl in the picture, I would take good care of my belongings to avoid unnecessary losses to myself.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十五：《责任心》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十五-责任心

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.word: 在录像中，我看到有三个小女孩坐在客厅的沙发上玩游戏和看电视，她们的妈妈看见了，就决定带她们出门去做运动。她们来到组屋楼下，利用健身器材锻炼身体，然后又绕着楼下的跑道慢跑。
words.english: In the video, I saw three little girls sitting on the sofa in the living room, playing games and watching TV. Their mother saw this and decided to take them out to do some exercise. They came to the downstairs of the HDB flat to use the fitness equipment to exercise, and then jogged around the track downstairs.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十六-运动有益健康

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.word: 有一个小女孩坐在长凳上玩手机，她的朋友看见了，立刻叫她一起去玩电动平衡车，并很有耐心地教她怎么玩电动平衡车。有两个男生在踢足球，他们玩得不亦乐乎。还有很多同学在学校的室内体育馆里打羽毛球，玩得很开心。
words.english: There was a little girl sitting on the bench playing with her mobile phone. When her friend saw it, she immediately asked her to play with the electric balance car and patiently taught her how to play with the electric balance car. Two boys were playing football and they were having a great time. Many classmates were having a good time playing badminton in the school's indoor gym.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十六-运动有益健康

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.word: 看了这段录像，我感到十分开心。我认为除了学习之外，运动对我们学生来说也是十分必要的。因为多做运动可以使身体更强壮，不容易生病，还能减轻学习上的压力；也能增进家人和朋友之间的感情。如果是我，我也会参加各类体育活动，养成爱运动的好习惯。
words.english: I felt very happy after watching this video. I think that in addition to studying, exercise is also very necessary for our students. Doing more exercise can make the body stronger and less likely to get sick. It can also reduce the pressure of study and enhance the relationship between family and friends. If it were me, I would also participate in various sports activities to develop a good habit of loving sports.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：练习三十六：《运动有益健康》
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-练习三十六-运动有益健康

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.word: 我曾经看过一件危险的事情。
words.english: I once saw a dangerous thing
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题六-危险的事情
words.pinyin: wǒ céng jīng kàn guò yī jiàn wēi xiǎn de shì qíng 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.word: 记得一天下午，我放学回家后，看见有一个顽皮的小男孩在组屋楼下溜滑轮。一个女士看到了，就指着墙上“禁止溜滑轮”的告示牌，叫他不要溜滑轮，但是他把女士的话当耳边风，还继续玩。
words.english: I remember one afternoon when I came home from school, I saw a naughty little boy roller-skating downstairs in a HDB flat. A lady saw this and pointed at the sign on the wall prohibiting roller-skating and told him not to roller-skating. But he turned a deaf ear to the lady’s words and continued to play.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题六-危险的事情

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.word: 我认为小男孩在组屋楼下溜滑轮是非常危险的行为，他没有为别人的安全着想。如果一个不小心，他不但会跌倒，让自己受伤，还会撞上别人。特别是小孩、孕妇或老年人，他们可能会因此而受伤或住院，后果不堪设想。
words.english: I think it is very dangerous for a little boy to skate downstairs in a HDB flat. He does not think about the safety of others. If he is not careful, he will not only fall and injure himself, but also hit others, especially children, pregnant women or the elderly. They may be injured or hospitalized and the consequences will be disastrous.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题六-危险的事情

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题六：危险的事情
words.word: 总而言之，我们不应该在组屋楼下溜滑轮。如果想要溜滑轮，就应该到公园去玩。
words.english: In short, we shouldn’t roller skate downstairs in HDB flats. If we want to roller skate, we should go to the park to play.

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.english: I helped my parents with housework
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题七-帮父母做家务
words.pinyin: wǒ bāng fù mǔ zuò guò jiā wù 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.word: 记得那是一个凉风习习的下午，放学回家后，我看到家里又脏又乱，吃早餐的碗盘也没洗。我心想：父母平时都忙于工作，放工后还要照顾我们的生活起居，非常辛苦。于是，我决定帮他们做一些比较简单的家务。
words.english: I remember it was a breezy afternoon. After I came home from school, I saw that the house was dirty and messy, and the dishes for breakfast had not been washed. I thought to myself: My parents are usually busy with work, and they have to take care of our daily life after work, which is very hard. So, I decided to help them do some simple housework.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题七-帮父母做家务

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.word: 我先清洗了碗盘，然后开始打扫家里的卫生，又是扫地又是擦桌子，不一会儿我累得满头大汗。但一想到我可以减轻父母的负担，不让他们太过劳累，我还是坚持把家务做完。
words.english: I first washed the dishes and then started cleaning the house. I swept the floor and wiped the table. After a while, I was so tired that I was sweating profusely. But when I thought that I could reduce the burden on my parents and prevent them from being too tired, I insisted on finishing the housework.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题七-帮父母做家务

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.word: 妈妈放工回家后，看到家里十分干净，脸上露出了欣慰的笑容，还称赞我是一个懂事的好孩子。总的来说，这件事让我深深体会到父母的辛苦和不易。从那天起，我经常帮父母做一些力所能及的家务，减轻他们的负担。
words.english: When my mother came home from work, she saw that the house was very clean. She had a happy smile on her face and praised me as a good and sensible child. Overall, this incident made me deeply appreciate the hard work and difficulty of my parents. From that day on, I often helped my parents with some housework within my ability to reduce their burden.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题七：帮父母做家务
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题七-帮父母做家务

words.english: Other housework: washing dishes, washing clothes, cleaning, hanging clothes, folding clothes, etc.

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.word: 我做过关心家人的事情。
words.english: I've done things to care about my family
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题八-关心家人
words.pinyin: wǒ zuò guò guān xīn jiā rén de shì qíng 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.word: 记得在我上小三的时候，有一次放学回家后，发现妈妈满脸通红、有气无力地躺在床上，原来妈妈感冒发烧了。看她那么难受，我心急如焚，赶快拿来感冒药让她吃。然后我又找了一片退热贴，贴在妈妈的额头上，帮助她降温。接着我跑到楼下的咖啡店，帮妈妈打包了一碗粥，拿回来喂妈妈。妈妈喝完粥，红红的脸上露出了欣慰的笑容，夸我是个孝顺的孩子。
words.english: I remember when I was in primary school, I came home from school and found my mother lying on the bed with a flushed face and weak. It turned out that my mother had a cold and a fever. Seeing how uncomfortable she was, I was so anxious that I quickly got her some cold medicine. Then I found another antipyretic patch and put it on my mother’s forehead to help her cool down. Then I ran to the coffee shop downstairs, helped my mother pack a bowl of porridge, and brought it back to feed her. After my mother finished the porridge, a happy smile appeared on her red face and she praised me as a filial child.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题八-关心家人

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.word: 记得去年学校假期期间，爸爸妈妈一大早便去上班了。我和弟弟起床后，发现弟弟身体发烫，便连忙拿出温度计帮他量体温。量了体温后，发现弟弟烧到39度，我大吃一惊，连忙打电话告诉妈妈。妈妈知道后，马上从公司赶回家。我在等妈妈的时候，拿了毛巾把弟弟身上的汗水擦干，以免他再着凉。后来，弟弟的病好转了。妈妈称赞我长大了，懂得照顾弟弟了。
words.english: I remember that during the school holidays last year, my parents went to work early in the morning. After my brother and I got up, we found that my brother was feeling hot, so I quickly took out a thermometer to measure his temperature. After taking his temperature, I found that my brother's fever reached 39 degrees. I was shocked and quickly called my mother to tell him. When my mother found out, she immediately rushed home from the company. While I was waiting for my mother, I took a towel and wiped the sweat off my brother's body to prevent him from catching cold again. Later, my brother's illness improved. My mother praised me for growing up and knowing how to take care of my younger brother.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题八：关心家人
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题八-关心家人

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.word: 我曾在学校里做过一件有礼貌的事情。
words.english: I once did a polite thing in school
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题九-有礼貌
words.pinyin: wǒ céng zài xué xiào lǐ zuò guò yī jiàn yǒu lǐ mào de shì qíng 。

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.word: 记得有一次课间休息时，我和几名值日生一起打扫教室。其他同学都早早地拿到了自己的清洁工具，但是刚好班级的拖把坏掉了，于是我就去跟校工林伯伯借拖把。我三步并作两步地走到校工室的门口，用力推开校工室的门，大声喊道：“拖把在哪里？”没想到，林伯伯没有理睬我，继续做着手头上的工作。
words.english: I remember one time during recess, I cleaned the classroom with several students on duty. Other students got their own cleaning tools early, but the class mop happened to be broken, so I went to borrow a mop from the school janitor, Uncle Lin. I walked to the door of the school laboratory in three steps and two steps at a time, pushed open the door of the school laboratory, and shouted: "Where is the mop?" Unexpectedly, Uncle Lin ignored me and continued to do the work at hand.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题九-有礼貌

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.word: 我心中十分纳闷。突然，我想起了老师平日的教导：要做一个有礼貌的好孩子，在学校里不仅要尊重老师，也要尊重其他工作人员。想到这儿，我走到林伯伯的身边，轻声地对林伯伯说：“林伯伯，对不起！我刚才对您没有礼貌，请您原谅我，好吗？我可以跟您借一下拖把吗？”林伯伯听了，抬起头，微笑着说：“当然可以，这才是懂礼貌的好孩子。”
words.english: I was very puzzled. Suddenly, I remembered the teacher's daily teaching: to be a good and polite child, you must respect not only the teacher, but also other staff in school. Thinking of this, I walked to Uncle Lin and said softly to Uncle Lin: "Uncle Lin, I'm sorry! I was rude to you just now, please forgive me, okay? Can I borrow a mop from you?" After hearing this, Uncle Lin raised his head and said with a smile: "Of course, this is a good polite boy."
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题九-有礼貌

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.word: 俗话说：“让礼一寸，得礼一尺。”身为学生的我们，要时刻提醒自己做一个尊敬师长、懂礼貌的好孩子。
words.english: As the saying goes: "If you give an inch of courtesy, you will receive a foot of courtesy." As students, we must always remind ourselves to be a good child who respects teachers and is polite.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题九：有礼貌
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题九-有礼貌

words.english: Talk about a responsible thing you have done in your life

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题十：有责任感
words.word: 不小心打翻了一杯饮料，把从图书馆借来的书给弄湿、弄脏了，尝试弄干净，留下了痕迹。到图书馆一五一十地告诉了管理员，道歉、负责、赔偿。管理员称赞我是诚实的、有责任感的好孩子。
words.english: I accidentally spilled a drink and got the books I borrowed from the library wet and dirty. I tried to clean them up and left traces. I went to the library and told the administrator in detail. I apologized and was responsible for compensation. The administrator praised me for being an honest and responsible good boy.

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.word: 我曾经参加过学校组织的校外学习之旅。在那次的活动中我学到了很多课本中学不到的知识。
words.english: I once participated in an off-campus study trip organized by the school. During that activity, I learned a lot of knowledge that cannot be learned in textbooks.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题十一-校外学习

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.word: 记得有一次，老师带我们去植物园，到那里学习和认识各种植物。我们一走进植物园时，就被那五颜六色的花草吸引住了。后来，老师带我们认识了很多奇特的植物，也告诉了我们那些植物的生长特点。
words.english: I remember one time the teacher took us to the botanical garden to learn and understand various plants. As soon as we entered the botanical garden, we were attracted by the colorful flowers and plants. Later, the teacher took us to know many strange plants and told us the growth characteristics of those plants.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题十一-校外学习

words.lesson: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.word: 我在书本上看过一些植物的图片，它们都长得相似，我看不出什么差别。来到植物园后，我才真正了解了不同植物的特点。我很喜欢这种到户外学习的活动。这样的学习方式让我感到很轻松、很有趣，而且学到的知识也记忆深刻。
words.english: I have seen some pictures of plants in books. They all look similar. I can't see any difference. Only after I came to the botanical garden did I really understand the characteristics of different plants. I really like this kind of outdoor learning activity. This way of learning makes me feel very relaxed and interesting, and the knowledge I learned is also deep in my memory.
words.section: 朗读／口试练习：问题十一：校外学习
words.group: 朗读-口试练习-问题十一-校外学习

words.lesson: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.word: 林叔叔是一个见义勇为的人，遇到不平的事情总会挺身而出。今天，他又做了一件令人佩服的事儿。
words.english: Uncle Lin is a brave man who always stands up for injustice. Today he did another admirable thing.
words.section: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.group: 朗读-写作练习-抓抢匪

words.lesson: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.word: 下班后，林叔叔像往常一样，慢慢地走路回家。当他快走到家的时候，看见迎面走来一名男子，留着一头短发，戴着一副墨镜，打扮得很时尚。他假装慢慢地从林叔叔身边走过，当他与后边那位女士擦肩而过时，突然伸出手，快速地抢走女士肩膀上的包，然后拔腿就跑。女士吓得花容失色，惊慌失措地大声尖叫道：“抢劫了！快抓抢匪啊！”
words.english: After get off work, Uncle Lin walked home slowly as usual. When he was almost walking home, he saw a man walking towards him, with short hair, wearing a pair of sunglasses, and dressed fashionably. He pretended to walk slowly by Uncle Lin. When he passed by the lady behind him, he suddenly reached out his hand, quickly snatched the bag from the lady's shoulder, and then ran away. The lady turned pale with fright, and screamed in panic: "It's been robbed! Catch the robber quickly!"
words.section: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.group: 朗读-写作练习-抓抢匪

words.lesson: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.word: 林叔叔听见喊叫声，急忙转过身，发现抢匪就是刚才看见的那名男子。他一个箭步地冲了上去，一边追抢匪，一边大声喊道：“抢匪，哪里跑？快给我站住！”热心的路人看到了，也赶快帮忙打电话报警。最后，林叔叔费了九牛二虎之力，追上了抢匪，并把他抓住。当女士看到抢匪被抓住了，也松了一口气。
words.english: Uncle Lin heard the shouting and turned around quickly and found that the robber was the man he saw just now. He rushed forward, chasing the robber, and shouted loudly: "Robber, where are you running? Stop right now!" Enthusiastic passers-by saw it and quickly called the police for help. Finally, Uncle Lin spent a lot of effort to catch up with the robber and catch him. When the lady saw that the robber was caught, she breathed a sigh of relief.
words.section: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.group: 朗读-写作练习-抓抢匪

words.lesson: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.word: 就在这时，警察风驰电掣地赶到了现场，将抢匪捉拿归案。然后，林叔叔把挎包还给了女士。看到失而复得的挎包，女士激动万分，竖起大拇指，称赞林叔叔勇敢，并感谢林叔叔的拔刀相助。林叔叔听了，不好意思地说：“没什么，这是我应该做的。”
words.english: At this moment, the police rushed to the scene and arrested the robber. Then, Uncle Lin returned the satchel to the lady. Seeing the recovered satchel, the lady was extremely excited. She gave a thumbs up, praised Uncle Lin for his bravery, and thanked Uncle Lin for his help. After hearing this, Uncle Lin said sheepishly: "It's nothing, this is what I should do."
words.section: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.group: 朗读-写作练习-抓抢匪

words.lesson: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》
words.word: 林叔叔真是一个见义勇为的英雄，我们都很佩服他。
words.english: Uncle Lin is really a hero who acts bravely for justice. We all admire him.
words.section: 朗读／写作练习：《抓抢匪》

words.pinyin: lín shū shū zhēn shì yí gè jiàn yì yǒng wéi de yīng xióng ， wǒ men dōu hěn pèi fú tā 。

words.lesson: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.word: 每天读一遍《抓抢匪》，先读慢，再读顺，再读出感情
words.english: Read "To Catch a Robber" once a day. First read it slowly, then read it smoothly, and then read out the feelings.
words.section: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.group: 复习建议-如何让孩子记得更牢
words.pinyin: měi tiān dú yī biàn 《 zhuā qiǎng fěi 》， xiān dú màn ， zài dú shùn ， zài dú chū gǎn qíng

words.lesson: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.word: 先背15个好词，再背8个参考词汇，最后背5个默写佳句
words.english: First memorize 15 good words, then memorize 8 reference vocabulary words, and finally memorize 5 good dictation sentences.
words.section: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.group: 复习建议-如何让孩子记得更牢
words.pinyin: xiān bèi 15 gè hǎo cí ， zài bèi 8 gè cān kǎo cí huì ， zuì hòu bèi 5 gè mò xiě jiā jù

words.lesson: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.word: 好词 → 解释 → 造句 → 佳句 → 看图讲故事 → 完整作文
words.english: Good words → explanation → sentence creation → good sentences → tell stories through pictures → complete composition

words.lesson: 复习建议：如何让孩子记得更牢
words.word: 让孩子用自己的话复述，不必一开始逐字背
words.english: Let the children retell it in their own words without having to memorize it verbatim at first.
